title: Nexus Compute Output Envelope
description: Standard 4-part output envelope returned by a WASM compute module (V1.61 ABI, compass Q8). Modules emit state deltas to apply, timeline events to append (aligned with V1.60 timeline.event.append), new KeyBlocks to create, and a module-declared freeform report. The host applies these in order: state_delta -> new_key_blocks -> timeline_events, then surfaces battle_report.

op.description: Delta operation: add (increment numeric), sub (decrement numeric), set (replace value). Applied to nested state paths on computable KeyBlock bodies (compass Q5, e.g. character.current_hp).

path.description: Dotted state path within the target KeyBlock body (e.g. 'character.current_hp'). Resolution semantics are finalized in P3 (state delta merge).

target_key_block_id.description: KeyBlock the delta applies to. When omitted, the host applies the delta to the KeyBlock implied by the capability context.

value.description: Value for set, or numeric delta for add/sub. Untyped (any JSON) to allow module-declared state shapes.

state_delta.description: Ordered list of +/-/set state operations to apply to computable KeyBlock bodies.

timeline_events.description: Timeline events to append (V1.60 timeline.event.append). Typically a story_advance or state_update event recording the outcome of the compute step.

new_key_blocks.description: New KeyBlocks the module creates (e.g. a spawned item, a newly established faction relation). These are upserted by the host.

kind.description: Discriminator identifying the report shape (e.g. 'combat' for casualties, 'economy' for market_prices). Consumers switch on this to interpret the freeform fields.

battle_report.description: Module-declared freeform report. kind discriminates the payload; remaining fields are module-specific (combat -> casualties, economy -> market_prices). Kept open (additionalProperties: true) per the V1 envelope decision (compass Q8).
